name: Phase 9 Closed portfolio and retrospectives requirements matrix

rows.requirement: Closure checklist and closure workflow domain
evidence: packages/project-core/src/index.ts implements ClosureChecklist, ClosureRequirement, ClosureData, LessonLearned, ProjectClosureReadiness, ProjectClosureDecision, evaluateProjectClosureReadiness, and closeManagedProjectWithClosure.

Closure readiness checks tenant/project mismatch before exposing detailed closure state, validates required closure fields, blocks non-final/non-active projects, includes stage-gate blockers, and detects open required template tasks.

closeManagedProjectWithClosure requires auditEventId, actor, timestamp, correlation id, complete closure data, and only allows overridable blockers when a blockerOverride has a reason and auditEventId. It returns an immutable completed ManagedProject plus auditable closure decision without mutating the source project.

packages/project-core/src/projectClosure.test.ts covers missing closure requirements, open required task blocker, successful closure, auditable closure decision, targeted governed override with audit reference, rejection of generic/partial overrides, tenant mismatch, and source-project immutability.
apps/api/src/phase9Runtime.ts and apps/api/src/app.ts expose P9 closure readiness, preview, apply, audit/action evidence, and readback through API routes while using project-core closure commands.
Review fixes ensure closure apply performs no audit/action/snapshot partial write before preview validation and invalidates previews when the project changes after preview.

rows.blocker: Domain and API foundation are implemented, but P9-001 cannot be verified until closure UI and executable E2E-080 prove full user write-flow readback, audit, permissions, reload persistence, and cleanup/reset.

evidence: packages/retrospectives introduces the @kiss-pm/retrospectives bounded context for Phase 9 snapshot/retrospective domain work.

packages/retrospectives/src/index.ts implements ClosedProjectSnapshot, source refs, schedule/resource/KPI summary DTOs, createClosedProjectSnapshot, readClosedProjectSnapshot, and RetrospectiveModelError.

createClosedProjectSnapshot requires a completed project, tenant/project match with ProjectClosureDecision, deterministic snapshot version/capturedAt, source refs for project/process template/closure decision/schedule baseline/KPI evaluations, and deep-cloned snapshot/readback data.

packages/retrospectives/src/closedProjectSnapshot.test.ts proves snapshot capture, source refs, plan/work metrics, stability after mutating source project/template/lesson data, tenant mismatch rejection, and KPI summary runtime validation.
apps/api/src/phase9Runtime.ts creates ClosedProjectSnapshot during governed closure apply and stores immutable snapshot readback for /api/retrospectives/snapshots routes.

apps/api/src/phase9ClosedPortfolioApi.test.ts proves preview does not mutate, apply creates snapshot/audit/action evidence, readback returns the snapshot, PATCH mutation is denied, permission/cross-tenant attempts do not create snapshots, stale previews do not create snapshots, and post-preview project changes invalidate preview.

evidence: apps/api/src/app.ts exposes GET /api/retrospectives/snapshots, GET /api/retrospectives/snapshots/:snapshotId, method-denial for snapshot mutation, and GET /api/retrospectives/audit.

rows.cleanup: API tests use in-memory deterministic app instances and prove no snapshot is created after denied/stale/missing closure attempts. Full reset/reload cleanup remains blocked until P9 deterministic fixtures and E2E-081/E2E-082.
rows.blocker: Snapshot readback API exists and has integration evidence, but P9-003 remains blocked until deterministic fixtures and E2E-081/E2E-082 prove browser/API reload persistence, later live/template edits do not rewrite snapshots, and cleanup/reset.

evidence: packages/retrospectives/src/index.ts implements PlanFactMetric, RetrospectiveTrend, calculatePlanFactMetrics, and buildRetrospectiveTrends.

Plan/fact metrics are calculated from ClosedProjectSnapshot source data only for work hours, schedule days, overload count, and KPI drift, with deterministic ids, variance values, variance percentages where meaningful, severity, and sourceSnapshotIds.
Trend calculations group tenant-scoped snapshot metrics by project_type, template, client, or period and return deterministic sourceSnapshotIds/sourceMetricIds without using live project state.
Review fixes added runtime validation for invalid period source timestamps and invalid groupBy values so future API callers receive typed domain errors instead of malformed trend ids/group keys.

rows.cleanup: P9-004 is pure deterministic domain logic with no runtime persistence. Tests prove trend read models are cloned/stable after input snapshots are mutated later; full browser/API reset cleanup remains blocked until P9-009 E2E-082/E2E-083.
rows.blocker: P9 trend engine domain foundation is implemented, but P9-004 cannot be verified until closed portfolio/trends API/UI and executable E2E-082/E2E-083 prove readback, reload persistence, template-improvement source trace, and cleanup/reset.

rows.requirement: Lessons learned and retrospective insight model
evidence: packages/retrospectives/src/index.ts implements RetrospectiveInsight, RetrospectiveInsightSourceLesson, readRetrospectiveInsight, createRetrospectiveInsights, and markRetrospectiveInsightHandled.

Insights derive from tenant-scoped RetrospectiveTrend plus ClosedProjectSnapshot lessons, preserve sourceTrendId/sourceSnapshotIds/sourceMetricIds/sourceLessonIds/sourceLessons, and return cloned stable readback.

Handled state requires governed template_improvement.apply action evidence with actionExecutionId, auditEventId, actor, timestamp, and matching tenant; already-handled insights cannot be handled again.
Review fixes prevent weak insights without actionable severity and reject trends without source snapshot/metric trace before returning insight data.
